\tzpentry{ID3315}{Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3315 introduces Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \left( \Box_{(4)} + \frac{n^2}{R_ \text{KK}^2} \right) \phi_n = 0 \end{equation}
